nodes.label: DeadlinesPanel
nodes.description: Academic Deadlines panel (المواعيد الأكاديمية) shown as a tab in StudentView.

nodes.label: DeadlinesPanel
nodes.description: Panel showing upcoming academic deadlines (مواعيد قادمة). Lists assignments, exams, presentations and registration events with due dates, subject tags, and type badges (تسليم, عرض, اختبار, مناقشة قضائية, تسجيل). Includes a 'View All' control.

properties.description: Academic deadlines panel (المواعيد الأكاديمية tab). Lists upcoming submissions, exams, and presentations with due dates, countdown labels, and linked course names. Screenshot shows 8 total deadlines, 7 this month.
